chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. S-138 of 2019 For Hearing of main case. 10-06-2019 Mr.J.K. Jarwar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik AAG. After arguing this matter some length, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. However, he is at liberty to approach appropriate forum in accordance with law.
